candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; exact match to ACT.
Balancing/subtotal helper line, not a reported total; inferior to explicit total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Component of cash, but narrower than total cash and cash equivalents.
Minor component only, not the total CHE measure.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance can tie out, but balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not period-end balance sheet CHE.

candidates.row_label: Increase/(decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.
Acquisition cash flow item, unrelated to CHE balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet total rather than components or cash flow balances.

candidates.why: Balancing helper line; not ideal if an explicit reported total exists.
Non-current liabilities balancing line, not LCT.
Explicit reported total for current/short-term liabilities on the balance sheet; best match for LCT.

variables.notes: Chose label outside shortlist: 'Short-term liabilities' is the explicit total current liabilities line and is preferable to balancing items.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; clean fit for STD and excludes leases.
Would be ideal if populated, but values are blank in preview and the identified current debt line is clearer.
Cash flow movement, not balance sheet short-term debt stock.

variables.notes: R:c. Excluded lease-related rows per rule. Did not use 'Interest-bearing loans and borrowings' because it appears to duplicate the same current-maturity debt amount.

candidates.why: Direct current tax payable/current income tax liability line; best match for TXP.
Deferred tax, not taxes payable/current tax liability.
Tax receivable asset, opposite of payable.
Could include payroll/VAT/other duties within trade payables, less clean than explicit income tax liability.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit current income tax liability line rather than broader tax/state duties within payables.

candidates.why: Explicit PPE total/net line; preferred for PPEGT.
Gross tangible assets could include more than PPE and is not the clean reported net PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net
candidates.why: Lease ROU asset component only, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease ROU asset component only, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Not PPE.
Not PPE.
Not PPE.
Not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Disposal of tangible fixed assets and intangible assets
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of tangible fixed assets and intangible assets
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not balance sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported PPE line.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line on the balance sheet; exact match for AT.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct operating cash flow subtotal; exact match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Other Operating Cash Flow - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Reconciling component within CFO, not the total operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Used the explicit net cash flow from operating activities line.
